com.hp.workpath.api.scanner

Class ScanAttributesCaps

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributesCaps

  • public final class ScanAttributesCaps
extends java.lang.Object
    Scan attributes capabilities provided available values from the device.
    Since:
    API 1

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.AutomaticStraightenMode> getAutomaticStraightenModeList()
      Gets the supported scan AutomaticStraightenMode by the device
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.AutomaticToneMode> getAutomaticToneModeList()
      Gets the supported scan AutomaticToneMode by the device
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.BackgroundCleanup> getBackgroundCleanupList()
      Gets the supported scan background cleanup options by the device
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.BlankImageRemovalMode> getBlankImageRemovalModeList()
      Gets the supported scan blank image removal modes by the device
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.CaptureMode> getCaptureModeList()
      Gets the supported scan CaptureMode by the device
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.ColorDropoutMode> getColorDropoutModeList()
      Gets the supported scan color dropout modes by the device
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.ColorMode> getColorModeList()
      Gets the groups of color sets supported by the device.
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.ContrastAdjustment> getContrastAdjustmentList()
      Gets the supported scan contrast adjustment options by the device
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.CropMode> getCropModeList()
      Gets the supported scan crop modes by the device
      Range getCustomLengthRange()
      Gets a range of custom length for scan size.
      Range getCustomWidthRange()
      Gets a range of custom width for scan size.
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.DarknessAdjustment> getDarknessAdjustmentList()
      Gets the supported scan darkness adjustment options by the device
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.Destination> getDestinationList()
      The destinations to which the scanned images can be sent.
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.DocumentFormat> getDocumentFormatList(ScanAttributes.Destination destination)
      The output formats in which the scanned images can be created.
      java.util.Map<ScanAttributes.ColorMode,java.util.List<ScanAttributes.DocumentFormat>> getDocumentFormatsByColorMode()
      Gets the list of supported document formats for each color mode
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.Duplex> getDuplexList()
      Gets duplex options supported by the device

      Gets a range of EraseBackBottomRange.

      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.EraseMarginUnit> getEraseMarginUnitList()
      Gets the supported scan EraseMarginUnits by the device
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.JobAssemblyMode> getJobAssemblyModeList()
      Gets the supported job assembly modes by the device
      Range getMaxPagesPerAttachmentRange()
      Gets a range of max pages per attachment range.
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.MediaSource> getMediaSourceList()
      Gets the supported media source options by the device
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.MediaWeightAdjustment> getMediaWeightAdjustmentList()
      Gets the supported media weight adjustment options by the device
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.MisfeedDetectionMode> getMisfeedDetectionModeList()
      Gets the supported misfeed detection modes by the device
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.Orientation> getOrientationList()
      Gets the supported original orientation options by the device
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.OutputQuality> getOutputQualityList()
      Gets the supported scan output qualities by the device
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.ProgressDialogMode> getProgressDialogModeList()
      Gets the supported modes for using scan progress dialog by the device
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.Resolution> getResolutionList()
      Gets the supported scan resolution options by the device
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.ScanPreview> getScanPreviewList()
      Gets the supported options for scan preview by the device
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.ScanSize> getScanSizeList()
      A list of supported scan sizes.
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.SharpnessAdjustment> getSharpnessAdjustmentList()
      Gets the supported sharpness adjustment options by the device
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.SplitAttachmentByPage> getSplitAttachmentByPageList()
      Gets the supported scan Split Attachment By Pages by the device
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.TextPhotoOptimization> getTextPhotoOptimizationList()
      Gets the supported text/photo optimization options by the device
      java.util.List<ScanAttributes.TransmissionMode> getTransmissionModeList()
      Gets the supported scan transmission modes by the device

    • Method Detail

      • getColorModeList

        public java.util.List<ScanAttributes.ColorMode> getColorModeList()
        Gets the groups of color sets supported by the device.
        Returns:
        the color modes supported.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the ColorMode from ScanAttributes.ColorMode
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getDuplexList

        public java.util.List<ScanAttributes.Duplex> getDuplexList()
        Gets duplex options supported by the device
        Returns:
        List of duplex options.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the Duplex from ScanAttributes.Duplex
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getDestinationList

        public java.util.List<ScanAttributes.Destination> getDestinationList()
        The destinations to which the scanned images can be sent.
        Returns:
        the supported destinations.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the Destination from ScanAttributes.Destination
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getDocumentFormatList

        public java.util.List<ScanAttributes.DocumentFormat> getDocumentFormatList(ScanAttributes.Destination destination)
        The output formats in which the scanned images can be created. The supported format are destination-specific.
        Parameters:
        destination - type of destination.
        Returns:
        the output formats supported.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the DocumentFormat from ScanAttributes.DocumentFormat
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getScanSizeList

        public java.util.List<ScanAttributes.ScanSize> getScanSizeList()
        A list of supported scan sizes.
        Returns:
        scan sizes list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the ScanSize from ScanAttributes.ScanSize
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getCustomLengthRange

        public Range getCustomLengthRange()
        Gets a range of custom length for scan size.
        Returns:
        range for custom length.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the range [2.9, 34.0].

        Since:
        API 1

      • getCustomWidthRange

        public Range getCustomWidthRange()
        Gets a range of custom width for scan size.
        Returns:
        range for custom width.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the range [2.16, 8.5].

        Since:
        API 1

      • getOrientationList

        public java.util.List<ScanAttributes.Orientation> getOrientationList()
        Gets the supported original orientation options by the device
        Returns:
        supported Orientation list

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the Orientation from ScanAttributes.Orientation
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getScanPreviewList

        public java.util.List<ScanAttributes.ScanPreview> getScanPreviewList()
        Gets the supported options for scan preview by the device
        Returns:
        supported ScanPreview list

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the ScanPreview from ScanAttributes.ScanPreview
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getResolutionList

        public java.util.List<ScanAttributes.Resolution> getResolutionList()
        Gets the supported scan resolution options by the device
        Returns:
        supported Resolution list

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the Resolution from ScanAttributes.Resolution
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 1

        public java.util.List<ScanAttributes.BackgroundCleanup> getBackgroundCleanupList()

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the BackgroundCleanup from ScanAttributes.BackgroundCleanup
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

      • getMaxPagesPerAttachmentRange

        public Range getMaxPagesPerAttachmentRange()
        Gets a range of max pages per attachment range.
        Returns:
        range for max pages per attachment range

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the range [1.0, 9999.0].

        Since:
        API 5
